title: Project Title
description: Short summary for cards and index pages.
summary: One sentence summary used as the project detail headline.

sections.heading: Overview
body: Explain what the project is and who it is for.
Add the practical context behind the work.

sections.heading: Challenge
body: Mention constraints, technical issues, or user needs.

sections.heading: Approach
body: Explain how the project was planned and built.
Mention the stack, decisions, or workflows that mattered.

sections.heading: Outcome
body: Explain what changed after the work.
